message:
fix: reservation release artifacts use DB-authoritative timestamps, test fixes, cleanup

- resources.rs: refactor file_reservations cleanup to re-read released
  rows from DB for authoritative released_ts instead of building payloads
  inline with a local now_micros; add test verifying artifact timestamps
  match the DB
- queries.rs: add missing migrate_to_latest calls in two tests, fix
  SQLite doc-comment lint, rename test agent RedField -> RedCat
- reconstruct.rs: fix frontmatter extraction test to expect trailing
  newline
- search_planner.rs: update effective_limit clamp-high test (100k -> 5000)
- analytics.rs: remove unused MailScreenId import
- storage/lib.rs: refactor queue_is_empty to idiomatic block expression

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
